messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a warm PowerPoint presentation for donors in the Nonprofit industry detailing our annual impact and fundraising goals, containing exactly 20 slides with a trustworthy theme using red, white, and light gray colors. The output filename must be "Annual_Impact.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard nonprofit impact metrics. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_RED = RGBColor(196, 30, 58)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(33, 33, 33)
ACCENT_GRAY = RGBColor(180, 180, 180)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(120, 120, 120)

TITLE_FONT = "Aptos" if os.path.exists("C:/Windows/Fonts/Aptos.ttf") else "Calibri"
BODY_FONT = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color=WHITE):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=BODY_FONT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top, font_size=18, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(6), Inches(0.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = TITLE_FONT
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=20):
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(4), Inches(0.3),
        "Annual Impact Report 2024", font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    )
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(11.8), Inches(7.0), Inches(1), Inches(0.3),
        f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT
    )


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6),
                     alt_text, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Red accent bar at top
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Title text on red bar
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7),
                 "Annual Impact Report", font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Subtitle below red bar
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(1.8), Inches(9), Inches(0.6),
                 "Making a Difference Together — 2024", font_size=24, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Thin decorative line
    add_card(slide, Inches(5), Inches(2.7), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Organization name and year
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),
                 "Community Hope Foundation", font_size=28, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.9), Inches(10), Inches(0.4),
                 "Annual Report & Fundraising Goals", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Bottom decorative element
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(7.2), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.3), PRIMARY_RED)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Agenda", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    items = [
        ("Our Mission & Vision", 1.6),
        ("Key Metrics at a Glance", 2.3),
        ("Programs & Initiatives Overview", 3.0),
        ("Community Impact Highlights", 3.7),
        ("Financial Transparency Report", 4.4),
        ("Fundraising Goals for 2025", 5.1),
        ("How You Can Help", 5.8),
    ]

    for i, (item, y) in enumerate(items):
        num = str(i + 1).zfill(2)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(y), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     num, font_size=18, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, Inches(2.3), Inches(y + 0.05), Inches(0.04), Inches(0.3), PRIMARY_RED)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.6), Inches(y), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                     item, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_mission_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Our Mission"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Our Mission", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Large quote card
    card = add_card(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(10), Inches(3.5), LIGHT_GRAY, ACCENT_GRAY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Our Mission", font_size=22, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(2.6), Inches(9), Inches(2.5),
                 '"To empower underserved communities through education, healthcare access, and sustainable development — creating lasting change that transforms lives and builds hope for future generations."',
                 font_size=18, color=DARK_TEXT)

    # Vision statement card below
    add_card(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.4), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(5.6), Inches(9), Inches(0.3),
                 "Our Vision", font_size=18, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(9), Inches(0.5),
                 "A world where every person has the opportunity to thrive regardless of their circumstances.",
                 font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_key_metrics_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Metrics at a Glance"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Key Metrics at a Glance", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    metrics = [
        ("12,450+", "People Served", "Across 8 programs"),
        ("$3.2M", "Funds Raised", "For community projects"),
        ("850+", "Active Volunteers", "Dedicated supporters"),
        ("94%", "Program Efficiency", "Direct impact ratio"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.7)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_width - 3 * gap) / 2 + Inches(0.5)

    for i, (number, label, sub) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(3.2), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)

        # Red top accent on each card
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.08), PRIMARY_RED)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.4), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.7),
                     number, font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(1.3), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(2.0), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.8),
                     sub, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_program_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Programs & Initiatives"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Programs & Initiatives", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    programs = [
        ("Education Access", "Providing scholarships and learning resources to 4,200 students annually"),
        ("Healthcare Outreach", "Mobile clinics serving rural communities with free medical care"),
        ("Clean Water Initiative", "Building wells and water systems in 15 villages across the region"),
        ("Youth Empowerment", "Mentorship programs for at-risk youth aged 14–24"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(5.8)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_width - gap) / 2 + Inches(0.5)

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(programs):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * Inches(2.8)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(2.4), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.06), PRIMARY_RED)

        # Icon placeholder circle
        icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        icon_shape.fill.solid()
        icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_RED
        icon_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.3), y + Inches(0.25), card_width - Inches(1.6), Inches(0.4),
                     name, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0),
                     desc, font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_community_impact_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Community Impact Distribution"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Community Impact Distribution", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Education", "Healthcare", "Clean Water", "Youth Programs"]
    chart_data.add_series("Impact Share", (38, 27, 20, 15))

    left = Inches(4.5)
    top = Inches(1.6)
    width = Inches(4.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False
    legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_RED
    series.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = series.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"

    # Summary text on left side
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Impact by Sector", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    summary_items = [
        ("Education: 38%", "Largest share of resources"),
        ("Healthcare: 27%", "Mobile clinic expansion"),
        ("Clean Water: 20%", "15 new wells built"),
        ("Youth Programs: 15%", "Mentorship growth"),
    ]

    for i, (label, desc) in enumerate(summary_items):
        y = Inches(2.3) + i * Inches(0.7)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3),
                     label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3),
                     desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_financial_transparency_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Financial Transparency"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Financial Transparency", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Programs", "Administration", "Fundraising"]
    chart_data.add_series("Allocation %", (78, 12, 10))

    left = Inches(4.5)
    top = Inches(1.6)
    width = Inches(4.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    colors = [PRIMARY_RED, ACCENT_GRAY, MEDIUM_GRAY]
    for i, color in enumerate(colors):
        if i < len(plot.series):
            plot.series[i].format.fill.solid()
            plot.series[i].format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    series.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = series.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"

    # Left side summary
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Fund Allocation", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    alloc_items = [
        ("78% Programs", "Direct community impact"),
        ("12% Administration", "Operational efficiency"),
        ("10% Fundraising", "Sustainable growth"),
    ]

    for i, (label, desc) in enumerate(alloc_items):
        y = Inches(2.3) + i * Inches(0.7)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3),
                     label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3),
                     desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Bottom stat bar
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.6), Inches(12), Inches(1.0), LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "$3.2M", font_size=24, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(3), Inches(0.3),
                 "Total Funds Raised in 2024", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def build_year_in_review_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Year in Review"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Year in Review", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2024", "Launched Clean Water Initiative in 3 new villages"),
        ("Q2 2024", "Opened Mobile Health Clinic #7 in rural district"),
        ("Q3 2024", "Reached milestone of 10,000 students served"),
        ("Q4 2024", "Raised record $850K in annual fundraising campaign"),
    ]

    for i, (quarter, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = Inches(0.6) + i * Inches(3.1)
        y = Inches(1.6)

        # Card
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.8), Inches(4.5), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.8), Inches(0.7), PRIMARY_RED)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4),
                     quarter, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Divider line
        add_card(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.0), Inches(2.2), Inches(0.03), ACCENT_GRAY)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.2), Inches(2.4), Inches(3.0),
                     desc, font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    # Connecting line across cards
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.03), ACCENT_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def build_success_story_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Success Story"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Success Story", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Photo placeholder on left
    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5),
                             "assets/success_story.jpg", "Success Story Photo")

    # Quote card on right
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.7), Inches(1.6), Inches(6.8), Inches(3.5), LIGHT_GRAY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.0), Inches(1.9), Inches(6.2), Inches(0.4),
                 "A Life Changed", font_size=22, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(6.2), Inches(1.8),
                 '"Thanks to the scholarship program, I became the first in my family to attend university. Today, I am a nurse serving my own community. This foundation gave me hope when I needed it most."',
                 font_size=14, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(6.2), Inches(0.3),
                 "— Maria S., Scholarship Recipient 2023", font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Bottom stat
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.4), Inches(11.7), Inches(1.2), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.6), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "92%", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
                 "of beneficiaries report improved quality of life", font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def build_volunteer_impact_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Volunteer Impact"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Volunteer Impact", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Education Mentors", "Healthcare Workers", "Event Staff", "Admin Support"]
    chart_data.add_series("Hours Contributed", (4200, 3100, 2800, 1500))

    left = Inches(6.5)
    top = Inches(1.6)
    width = Inches(5.5)
    height = Inches(4.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    colors = [PRIMARY_RED, ACCENT_GRAY, MEDIUM_GRAY, RGBColor(200, 200, 200)]
    for i, color in enumerate(colors):
        if i < len(plot.series):
            plot.series[i].format.fill.solid()
            plot.series[i].format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    series.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = series.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    # Left side stats
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Volunteer Statistics", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    vol_stats = [
        ("850+", "Active Volunteers"),
        ("11,600", "Total Hours Contributed"),
        ("$930K", "Estimated Volunteer Value"),
        ("4.8/5", "Volunteer Satisfaction Score"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(vol_stats):
        y = Inches(2.3) + i * Inches(0.7)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.4),
                     num, font_size=18, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_size=14, color=DARK_TEXT)

    # Bottom highlight card
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.6), Inches(11.7), Inches(1.2), LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.8), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "11,600", font_size=24, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(6.2), Inches(5), Inches(0.3),
                 "Volunteer Hours in 2024 — A 35% Increase from 2023", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def build_fundraising_goals_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Fundraising Goals 2025"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Fundraising Goals 2025", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Goal progress cards in a row
    goals = [
        ("$5M", "Annual Fundraising Target"),
        ("$3.2M", "Raised So Far (64%)"),
        ("$1.8M", "Remaining to Reach Goal"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Target Completion Date"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.7)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_width - 3 * gap) / 2 + Inches(0.5)

    for i, (number, label) in enumerate(goals):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(1.8), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.06), PRIMARY_RED)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.25), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.7),
                     number, font_size=24, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(1.0), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6),
                     label, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Progress bar visualization
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Fundraising Progress", font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    progress_bg = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6), LIGHT_GRAY)
    progress_fill_width = Inches(7.5)  # ~64% of 11.7
    progress_fill = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3), progress_fill_width, Inches(0.6), PRIMARY_RED)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.0), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.4),
                 "64% of 2025 Annual Goal Achieved — On Track for Target", font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    # Key fundraising initiatives below
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.6), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Key Initiatives", font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    initiatives = [
        ("Annual Gala Dinner — $750K target"),
        ("Corporate Partnerships — $500K target"),
        ("Online Campaign — $350K target"),
        ("Major Donor Program — $400K target"),
    ]

    for i, init in enumerate(initiatives):
        y = Inches(6.1) + i * Inches(0.28)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(11.7), Inches(0.3),
                     f"• {init}", font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 11)

def build_future_vision_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Our Vision for 2025 and Beyond"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Our Vision for 2025 and Beyond", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    goals = [
        ("Expand to 3 New Regions", "Reaching underserved communities in neighboring provinces"),
        ("Double Volunteer Base", "Growing from 850 to 1,700 active volunteers"),
        ("Launch Digital Platform", "Online learning portal for remote students"),
        ("Increase Annual Budget by 40%", "Scaling programs to serve 20,000+ people"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(5.8)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_width - gap) / 2 + Inches(0.5)

    for i, (title_text, desc) in enumerate(goals):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * Inches(2.8)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(2.4), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.06), PRIMARY_RED)

        # Number badge
        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_RED
        num_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.3), card_width - Inches(1.2), Inches(0.5),
                     str(i + 1), font_size=20, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.3), y + Inches(0.25), card_width - Inches(1.6), Inches(0.4),
                     title_text, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0),
                     desc, font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Bottom vision statement
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.4), Inches(11.7), Inches(1.2), LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.6), Inches(10), Inches(0.3),
                 "Our Vision", font_size=18, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),
                 "To create a world where every community has the resources and opportunities to thrive — together.",
                 font_size=14, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 16)


def build_how_to_help_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "How You Can Help"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "How You Can Help", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    help_options = [
        ("Donate", "Every dollar makes a difference in someone's life.", "Start with as little as $25/month"),
        ("Volunteer", "Share your skills and time with our programs.", "Join 850+ dedicated volunteers today"),
        ("Advocate", "Spread the word about our mission and impact.", "Help us reach more communities in need"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.7)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_width - 2 * gap) / 2 + Inches(0.5)

    for i, (title_text, desc, cta) in enumerate(help_options):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(4.0), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.08), PRIMARY_RED)

        # Icon circle
        icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + (card_width - Inches(1.2)) / 2, y + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(1.2))
        icon_shape.fill.solid()
        icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_RED
        icon_shape.line.fill.background()

        # Icon text inside circle
        icons = ["$", "V", "#"]
        add_text_box(slide, x + (card_width - Inches(1.2)) / 2, y + Inches(0.4), Inches(1.2), Inches(1.0),
                     icons[i], font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.8), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5),
                     title_text, font_size=22, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(2.5), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(1.0),
                     desc, font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # CTA button style
        add_card(slide, x + Inches(0.4), y + Inches(3.5), card_width - Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), PRIMARY_RED)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.4), y + Inches(3.52), card_width - Inches(0.8), Inches(0.35),
                     "Get Involved", font_size=12, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 17)

        title_shape.text = "Upcoming Events"

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Upcoming Events", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    events = [
        ("Annual Gala Dinner", "March 15, 2025", "Grand Ballroom, City Center — $750K target"),
        ("Community Health Fair", "April 22, 2025", "Central Park — Free medical screenings for all"),
        ("Volunteer Appreciation Day", "May 10, 2025", "Foundation Headquarters — Celebrating our team"),

    ]

    card_width = Inches(5.8)

    for i, (name, date, desc) in enumerate(events):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * Inches(2.8)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(2.4), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.06), PRIMARY_RED)

        # Date badge
        date_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CHEVRON, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(1.8), Inches(0.5))
        date_shape.fill.solid()
        date_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_RED
        date_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.27), Inches(1.8), Inches(0.45),
                     date, font_size=11, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(2.3), y + Inches(0.25), card_width - Inches(2.6), Inches(0.4),
                     name, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.0), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2),
                     desc, font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Bottom CTA
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.4), Inches(11.7), Inches(1.2), LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.6), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "Join Us", font_size=20, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "Your presence at these events helps us raise vital funds for communities in need.",
                 font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 18)


def build_contact_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Contact Us"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Contact Us", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Left column: contact info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(4), Inches(0.4),
                 "Get in Touch", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    contacts = [
        ("📍 Address:", "123 Hope Street, Suite 400, Cityville, ST 12345"),
        ("📞 Phone:", "(555) 123-4567"),
        ("✉️ Email:", "info@communityhope.org"),
        ("🌐 Website:", "www.communityhope.org"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(contacts):
        y = Inches(2.3) + i * Inches(0.75)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.4),
                     value, font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Right column: social media placeholders
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Follow Us", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    socials = [
        ("Facebook", "@CommunityHope"),
        ("Twitter / X", "@CommHopeOrg"),
        ("Instagram", "@communityhope"),
        ("LinkedIn", "Community Hope Foundation"),
    ]

    for i, (platform, handle) in enumerate(socials):
        y = Inches(2.3) + i * Inches(0.75)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), y, Inches(1.8), Inches(0.4),
                     platform, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.3), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.4),
                     handle, font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Bottom card with donation link
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.6), Inches(12), Inches(1.2), LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "Donate Today", font_size=20, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "Visit www.communityhope.org/donate or call (555) 123-4567 to make your contribution.",
                 font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 19)


def build_thank_you_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Red accent bar at top
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Thank you text on red bar
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7),
                 "Thank You", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Subtitle below red bar
    add_card(slide, Inches(5), Inches(2.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), PRIMARY_RED)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.4), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                 "Your Support Makes All the Difference", font_size=24, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Impact summary card
    add_card(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.4), Inches(10), Inches(2.8), LIGHT_GRAY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.7), Inches(9), Inches(0.4),
                 "Together We Achieved in 2024", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    summary_items = [
        ("12,450 People Served", "Across 8 Programs"),
        ("$3.2M Raised for Community Projects", "78% Direct Impact"),
        ("850 Volunteers Contributing Time & Skills", "Building Hope Together"),
    ]

    for i, (line1, line2) in enumerate(summary_items):
        y = Inches(4.3) + i * Inches(0.6)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y, Inches(8), Inches(0.3),
                     f"• {line1}", font_size=15, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(8), Inches(0.3),
                     line2, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Bottom decorative element
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(7.2), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.3), PRIMARY_RED)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.8), Inches(10), Inches(0.4),
                 "Community Hope Foundation — www.communityhope.org", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 20)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_mission_slide(prs)
    build_key_metrics_slide(prs)
    build_program_overview_slide(prs)
    build_community_impact_slide(prs)
    build_financial_transparency_slide(prs)
    build_year_in_review_slide(prs)
    build_success_story_slide(prs)
    build_volunteer_impact_slide(prs)
    build_fundraising_goals_slide(prs)
    build_program_deep_dive_1_slide(prs)
    build_program_deep_dive_2_slide(prs)
    build_regional_impact_slide(prs)
    build_donation_breakdown_slide(prs)
    build_future_vision_slide(prs)
    build_how_to_help_slide(prs)
    build_upcoming_events_slide(prs)
    build_contact_slide(prs)
    build_thank_you_slide(prs)

    prs.save("Annual_Impact.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
